title: Agustín Jiménez
text: Home * People * Agustín Jiménez Agustín Jiménez [1] Agustín Jiménez , a Spanish industrial engineer and full professor at the Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (UPM). His research interests include continuously process control , fuzzy control and robots . Along with Pablo San Segundo et al., he published on bitboards [2] .
